query:
-- Active non-stale projects vs enrichment cache coverage
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalActiveProjects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pec.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as neverEnriched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pec.id IS NOT NULL AND pec.enrichedAt <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expiredCache,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pec.id IS NOT NULL AND pec.enrichedAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as freshCache
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN projectEnrichmentCache pec ON pec.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active';

  SUM(CASE WHEN pec.id IS NOT NULL AND pec.enrichedAt <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expiredCache,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pec.id IS NOT NULL AND pec.enrichedAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as freshCache
FROM projects p

WHERE p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active';
